title: 25 Pcs Mini Acrylic Mirror Small Acrylic Square Mirror Tiles Adhesive Small Mirror Sticker for DIY Bathroom Living Room Bedroom Wall (7.5 cm / 3 in)
features: Comes with a Protective Film: Each square mirror comes with a protective film on the front. When you are ready to use the mirror tile, just peel off the protective film to reveal the clear mirror surface

Small Size: Each acrylic square mirror measures approximately 3 x 3 inches and is approximately 0.04 inches thick. These mirror tiles are easy to carry and store, making them perfect for a variety of DIY projects. Be sure to check the size to meet your specific needs before purchasing

High-Quality Material: These stick-on small square mirror tiles are made of durable acrylic with a smooth surface and excellent texture. Strong adhesive backing ensures easy application, making these square mirrors a reliable choice for your creative projects

Versatile Application: These stick-on square mirror tiles are perfect for a variety of DIY projects. Whether making art projects, holiday decorations, or unique home decor, these mirror tiles can be used to design wall mirrors, desktop decorations, etc., adding charm and elegance to any environment

Sufficient Quantity: The package contains 25 pieces of stick-on small square mirrors, providing sufficient quantity for daily use and replacement. Share these square mirrors with family and friends to inspire creativity and collaboration to carry out your DIY projects
description: Product description Material: Acrylic Gross weight: 120g Product size: 7.5*7.5cm Packaging size: 20*15*1.9cm Packaging method: Bag packing Packing list: 25pcs*7.5cm acrylic mirror Safety Warning Handle with care to avoid breakage. Ensure proper mounting to prevent injury from sharp edges.
